message:
feat: workspace scanning for directory context injection

ScanWorkspace() walks the working directory and produces:
- Directory tree (depth-limited, entry-capped, excludes .git/node_modules/etc)
- Test file detection (Python, Go, JS/TS, Ruby, Rust, Java, C/C++, shell)
- Build system info (Makefile targets, package.json scripts, go.mod, Cargo.toml,
  CMake, pytest, Docker)

This will be injected into the system prompt so models start with full
workspace awareness instead of spending rounds on discovery.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
